name: Animated Guardians
description: Suits of ancient armor spring to life, defending the ruins with mindless determination!

dungeon_l1_encounter_2_complete.display_message: The animated armor crashes to the ground, their magic dissipating. You continue deeper into the ruins.

special_rules.description: Animated armor has high AC, use magic or crushing attacks

ambient_description: Suits of armor line the walls. As you approach, they creak to life, ancient enchantments still holding them in service to defend this place.
victory_description: The magical constructs collapse, their animating force spent. Only empty metal husks remain.
defeat_description: You flee from the relentless guardians. Their heavy footsteps stop at the chamber's threshold.
